caribbean.headline: Heavy Rain and Elevated Seas Impact Turks and Caicos Today
caribbean.paragraph: Turks and Caicos is experiencing strong easterly winds up to 22 kt with wave heights reaching 5.8 ft and a swell period of 7 seconds from the east. Rain probability is high at 84%, creating challenging conditions for marine and port operations, while St. Lucia sees lighter winds near 13 kt and less impactful weather.

mediterranean.headline: Heavy Rain and Moderate Seas Impact Haifa Port Today
mediterranean.paragraph: Haifa is experiencing heavy rain with a 100% rain probability accompanied by moderate westerly swells producing wave heights up to 6.4 feet. Winds remain light at 14 knots, while Mykonos sees slightly stronger winds at 20 knots but less intense precipitation.
